answers: Essential spices: cumin, turmeric, coriander, black pepper, cinnamon, paprika, garlic powder, ginger, chili flakes.
Spice benefits: turmeric (anti-inflammatory), cinnamon (blood sugar), ginger (digestion), cumin (immunity).
Spice tips: toast whole spices in dry pan for more flavor, buy whole and grind fresh, store in dark cool place.
Moshla: holud (anti-inflammatory), jira (digestion), dhone (flavor), ada (thanda laage), golmorich (immunity boost).
